spectra-care.title: Spectra Care App
spectra-care.summary: Telehealth app with Jetpack Compose, Agora video SDK, and IoT health monitoring.
spectra-care.description: Premium Android Native telehealth app built with Jetpack Compose — integrating Agora SDK video calling, Spectra SDK for 6-in-1 IoT health monitors, appointments, and lab tests.
spectra-care.altText: Spectra Care — Android Native telehealth app with Agora video calling and Spectra IoT health monitor integration, built by Senior Android Developer Muhammad Awais

zouris.title: Zouris: Holistic Wellness Platform
zouris.summary: Cross-platform meditation app built with Compose Multiplatform, shipping iOS and Android from one codebase.
zouris.description: Zouris is a holistic wellness platform engineered using Compose Multiplatform (KMP) where certified coaches, counselors, and wellness practitioners share guided sessions, meditations, and affirmations across iOS and Android.
zouris.altText: Zouris wellness coaching app — cross-platform meditation and coaching UI shared across iOS and Android using Compose Multiplatform

egora-b2b.title: Egora B2B: Restaurant Partner Platform
egora-b2b.summary: White-labeled KMP dashboard for restaurant owners to manage orders, pick-ups, and native table reservations.
egora-b2b.description: White-labeled B2B counterpart of the Egora ecosystem. Built using Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), it empowers restaurant owners on both Android & iOS to independently manage dine-in, pickup, reservations, and QR code ordering operations with full native payment integration.
egora-b2b.altText: Egora B2B restaurant partner dashboard — white-labeled order, reservation and QR ordering management built with a shared KMP codebase

egora.title: Egora: Smart Restaurant Ecosystem
egora.summary: Smart restaurant app with QR ordering, dine-in, and reservation management via shared KMP core.
egora.description: Comprehensive Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) restaurant management app streamlining dine-in, pickup, and reservation flows across platforms. Features unified QR code ordering logic and secure native payment gateway integrations for a seamless dining experience.
egora.altText: Egora restaurant ecosystem app — QR ordering, dine-in and pickup flows powered by a shared multiplatform business logic layer

makernote.title: Makernote: Multiplatform EdTech
makernote.summary: Educational platform with real-time collaboration built with KMP and Firebase.
makernote.description: High-performance educational app for teachers and students — built with Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) for seamless native iOS and Android delivery with real-time multiplatform collaboration features.
makernote.altText: Makernote EdTech app for teachers and students — real-time collaboration built with MVI architecture on Kotlin Multiplatform

eco-grocery.title: Eco Grocery: Smart Inventory & Recipes
eco-grocery.summary: Smart grocery tracker with barcode scanning, recipe recommendations, and expiry tracking.
eco-grocery.description: Intelligent Android grocery management app featuring a dynamic to-buy list linked to a recipe recommendation engine, plus a built-in barcode scanner for real-time nutritional tracking and expiry management.
eco-grocery.altText: Eco Grocery Android app — barcode-scanning grocery tracker with recipe recommendations and expiry alerts

hcloud.title: HCloud: Clinic Management Suite
hcloud.summary: Enterprise-grade operations portal for doctor clinics built with Clean Architecture.
hcloud.description: Enterprise-grade clinic operations platform serving thousands of healthcare providers with real-time prescription sync and smart appointment scheduling.
hcloud.altText: HCloud clinic management suite — real-time prescription sync and appointment scheduling for healthcare providers

healthwire.title: Healthwire: HealthTech Platform
healthwire.summary: Leading healthcare app with pharmacy logistics, lab booking, and telemedicine.
healthwire.description: Architected Pakistan's leading healthcare app — optimizing pharmacy logistics, lab-test booking, and telemedicine for thousands of daily active users.
healthwire.altText: Healthwire healthcare app — pharmacy logistics, lab test booking and telemedicine built with Jetpack Compose

dongamers.title: DonGamers: E-Sports Platform
dongamers.summary: Gaming tournament platform featuring robust real-time chats, brackets, and interactive custom animations.
dongamers.description: Built a global gaming community platform with real-time chat, tournament brackets, and Unity-powered interactive features — handling thousands of concurrent sessions.
dongamers.altText: DonGamers e-sports community platform — real-time tournament chat built with Socket.IO on Android
